caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with the words "CHECK IT!" printed on the chest and a dark baseball cap. He is equipped with over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone on a stand. Behind him is a white banner featuring the words "GRIND HUSTLE" and several gold stars. To the right, a red and black sign reads "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen graphics include a logo that says "T STUDIO PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. The man remains in a static seated position throughout the clip, looking slightly to the side with a neutral expression. There is virtually no movement between the frames, as he maintains his posture and gaze, and the camera angle remains fixed on him.
